Settings
Connect your Cloud Database
One-time setup. Paste your Supabase credentials below.
How to find these:
1. Go to supabase.com -> your project
2. Click the gear icon (Settings) in the left sidebar
3. Click "API"
4. Copy Project URL from the top
5. Under "Project API keys" copy the anon public key (the long one)
Cloud Connected!
